name: prose
description: Edit and draft work prose in one ordered pass: structure (characters as subjects, actions as verbs, old-to-new flow, emphasis in the stress position), concision (prune, plain diction, figurative-verb tics), and surface (AI-tell phrases, emphasis adverbs, telegraphed contrasts, rhythm). Ships the opt-in laconic register and the prose-gate Stop hook that lints final replies. Methods from Williams & Bizup, Klinkenborg, and Hardik Pandya's stop-slop, encoded in original wording; no text from the source books.
